tagline: Behavioral changes Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime.
what_it_does: Behavioral changes Review the following changes, which take effect when clusters restart on this runtime. NATURAL JOIN case insensitive column matching: NATURAL JOIN now respects the spark.sql.caseSensitive configuration (default: false) when matching common columns between the left and right sides of the join. Previously, column matching was always case sensitive, causing columns that differ only in case (for example, ID vs id) to not be recognized as common columns.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
